subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-05-23
subcodes.first_line: We know things by their opposites... When we were travelling from Baghdad toward Constantinople, one day, we thought to go ahead of the family
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @things are known by their opposites, @stories; anecdotes, @banishment to; life in Constantinople
